# libredash admin storage

Maintain analytical storage

## Usage

```sh
libredash admin storage
```

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |

## Subcommands

- `libredash cleanup`: Reconcile serving-state snapshots and clean DuckLake storage
